title: MapLight - Drupal Development for Political Transparency
description: Drupal Developer for MapLight, creating data-driven interfaces and Drupal solutions to reveal money's influence on politics, supporting open government initiatives.
role_overview: As Drupal Developer, Justin applied Software Development Lifecycle knowledge to develop and maintain Drupal sites (maplight.org, votersedge.org) for MapLight, a non-profit focused on political transparency. Justin architected data-driven solutions and ensured high performance.

custom-web-application-development.summary: Developed and architected data-centric Drupal sites, including custom modules and theming.
points: Developed Drupal sites (maplight.org, votersedge.org) including custom module development and theming.
Utilized Drupal modules to architect enterprise solutions for data management, display logic, and information architecture.

cloud-infrastructure-devops-solutions.summary: Ensured site reliability and performance through monitoring and supported DevOps tooling.
points: Spearheaded availability monitoring using synthetic tests (Selenium), identifying performance issues.
Ensured high performance utilizing tools like New Relic and Blazemeter.
Supported configuration management of tools like JIRA, Confluence, and Bamboo.

title: Stanford Graduate School of Business - Web Development & Security
description: Senior Web Developer role involving custom Drupal development, migration support, performance optimization, and significant security contributions via bug bounty program.
role_overview: As Senior Web Developer, Justin contributed significantly to the development, enhancement, and security of the Stanford Graduate School of Business web presence. His work involved full-stack Drupal development, migration support, performance tuning, security testing, and close collaboration with marketing and technical teams.

custom-web-application-development.summary: Performed extensive custom Drupal development, supported major migrations, and collaborated on feature implementation like 'Voices'.
points: Developed custom Drupal modules, themes, and distributions (PHP, Drupal APIs).
Supported migration from Drupal 7 to Drupal 9 (Salesforce integration, content type migration).
Partnered with marketing on site redesign and 'Voices' functionality.
Refactored code for improved responsiveness and applied caching strategies.
Worked effectively with release engineers and frontend developers.
Maintained Linux development build and onboarded colleagues/contractors.

web-security-ethical-hacking.summary: Actively participated in Stanford's Bug Bounty program, identifying and reporting multiple vulnerabilities.
points: Identified and reported several vulnerabilities through the Stanford Bug Bounty program (~$1500 awarded).
Contributed to enhancing organizational security posture through proactive testing.

title: Business Logic Errors - HackerOne Reward
description: Identified and responsibly disclosed a security vulnerability via HackerOne, contributing to platform security ($500 bounty awarded).
role_overview: As an Independent Security Researcher, Justin identified and reported a security vulnerability through the HackerOne platform, collaborating with the affected company's security team for remediation.

web-security-ethical-hacking.summary: Identified and responsibly disclosed a security vulnerability (Flaw In Business Logic) via the HackerOne platform, contributing to improved security posture and receiving a $500 bounty.
points: Conducted responsible disclosure according to HackerOne's security policy.
Provided detailed steps to reproduce the identified vulnerability.
Collaborated with the security team during the remediation process.
Received acknowledgement and a $500 bounty reward for the finding.

title: AI Models Platform (Acquired)
description: Founder & Lead Developer for aimodels.org, a highly visible platform for open-source AI innovation (acquired). Achieved top SEO rankings for competitive terms and engineered a large-scale audio generation pipeline demonstrating RVC model capabilities.
role_overview: As Founder & Lead Developer, Justin architected, developed, and managed aimodels.org, a Hugo-based platform focused on open-source AI models. Justin oversaw all aspects from conception through development, cloud administration (GCP), and community engagement. He implemented successful SEO strategies driving significant organic traffic and developed a novel large-scale audio generation pipeline using RVC models, culminating in a successful acquisition.

custom-web-application-development.summary: Led the full lifecycle development of the Hugo-based platform, including backend automation pipelines and collaboration on related community sites.
points: Architected and built the scalable Hugo static site.
Developed the automation pipeline for the RVC audio generation project (Python, scripting).
Managed full project lifecycle from conception to deployment and maintenance.
Fostered community collaboration through development of related sites (open-neuromorphic.org, fmcheatsheet.org).

seo-content-strategy-optimization.summary: Implemented robust SEO strategies resulting in top search rankings for key industry terms and significant organic traffic growth.
points: Achieved top organic search results for competitive terms like 'Download AI Models', 'AI Benchmark Tools', and 'Open Source AI Communities'.
Executed technical SEO, on-page optimization, and structured content for maximum search engine discoverability.
These strategies directly contributed to substantial and sustained organic traffic growth for the platform.

ai-data-integration-services.summary: Engineered a large-scale data pipeline to process and generate ~12,000 unique audio samples using ~450 RVC models, showcasing model diversity and driving significant user engagement.
points: Designed and implemented an automated pipeline to showcase ~450 RVC voice models.
Processed permissively licensed songs (Pixabay) involving vocal splitting, RVC model application, and audio recombination.
Generated ~12,000 unique song samples (approx. 27 diverse song contexts per model) to demonstrate model capabilities.
This content initiative proved to be a major driver of site traffic and user engagement.
Managed associated AI model metadata and data handling processes (implying Cloud SQL use).

cloud-infrastructure-devops-solutions.summary: Utilized Google Cloud Platform (GCP) for scalable application hosting, CI/CD, and database management.
points: Deployed and managed the application on Google Cloud Run.
Used Cloud Build for CI/CD and Cloud SQL for database management.

title: Open Neuromorphic Community Enablement & Visibility
description: Provided comprehensive web development, SEO, platform configuration, and branding expertise to Open Neuromorphic, significantly enhancing their online presence, operational efficiency, and community engagement.
role: Collaborator / Web & Community Platform Specialist (via AI Models initiative)
role_overview: As part of his AI Models community effort, Justin contributed broad web and technical expertise to Open Neuromorphic. This involved building their core web platform, optimizing for search visibility, configuring community tools (streaming, communication), and establishing branding guidelines to elevate their presence and support the open-source neuromorphic computing community.

custom-web-application-development.summary: Led the development of a new, user-friendly Hugo website and configured key community platforms (streaming, communication) to enhance engagement and professionalism.
points: Developed and launched a new Hugo-based website, providing a robust and scalable platform for the community's content.
Configured Streamyard streaming platform, including professional branding setup, enabling high-quality workshop delivery.
Introduced Discord configuration enhancements, such as self-assignable interest/expertise roles, to foster better community organization and contribution.
Streamlined website content structure and terminology for improved clarity and user experience.

seo-content-strategy-optimization.summary: Implemented SEO and content strategies resulting in top search rankings against industry giants, significant organic growth, and enhanced brand consistency across platforms.
points: Achieved and maintained a top 3 average search position (~2.7) for the core term 'neuromorphic hardware', 'neuromorphic', and 'neuromorphic software', establishing ONM as a key authority.
The hardware directory became a primary organic traffic driver (>4,600 clicks, >139,000 impressions in 2 years).
Designed and implemented a consistent thumbnail scheme for YouTube workshops, reinforcing the ONM brand identity and improving content discoverability.
Boosted overall search visibility through technical SEO, meta tag optimization, and structured content architecture.

cloud-infrastructure-devops-solutions.summary: Configured and optimized essential community tools and platforms to improve operational efficiency and member interaction.
points: Set up and branded the Streamyard platform for professional live workshop sessions.
Implemented Discord role management features to improve member identification and engagement.
Provided general technical administration support for key community platforms (YouTube, Discord).

title: Foundation Models Cheatsheet - Interactive Web Platform
description: Developed fmcheatsheet.org, an interactive Hugo platform for the *Foundation Models Cheatsheet* paper, collaborating with researchers from leading institutions (Google, MIT, Stanford CRFM, Hugging Face, etc.) to promote responsible AI practices.
role: Collaborator / Lead Web Developer (via AI Models initiative)
role_overview: Justin built fmcheatsheet.org using Hugo as an interactive online platform for the influential Foundation Model Development Cheatsheet paper. He collaborated closely with the paper's authors from AI2, EleutherAI, Google, Hugging Face, Masakhane, MIT, MLCommons, Princeton, Stanford CRFM, UCSB, UCL, and UW. Justin led an iterative web design process, incorporating multi-channel feedback to translate the academic resource into an accessible, SEO-optimized web format with a clear resource directory, enhancing its reach and promoting responsible AI development.

custom-web-application-development.summary: Transformed the Foundation Models Cheatsheet paper into an interactive, user-friendly Hugo website through a collaborative, iterative design process with researchers from multiple leading institutions.
points: Built the Hugo site from scratch, providing a more intuitive and engaging user experience compared to static paper formats.
Designed and implemented a clear resource directory structure, enhancing navigation and discoverability of specific guidance.
Managed an iterative design and development process, incorporating feedback from diverse stakeholders across multiple communication channels to achieve a cohesive final product.

seo-content-strategy-optimization.summary: Optimized the website structure and content for search engines to maximize the reach and impact of this key responsible AI resource.
points: Built the website applying SEO best practices to enhance discoverability by practitioners and researchers.
Structured content logically for both user navigation and effective search engine indexing.

Produced a feature to enable migration of complex 'micro-site' pages into Drupal content with minimal downtime.
Provided test coverage utilizing Behat.
Worked with internal teams and clients to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Addressed backlog items and implemented fixes.

title: Homeland Security Enterprise - GeoCONOPS Platform (ArdentMC)

role_overview: As a consultant via ArdentMC, Justin leveraged his deep expertise in Drupal 7 full-stack development to build and enhance the Geospatial Concept of Operations (GeoCONOPS) portal, part of the federal GeoPlatform initiative, focusing on improving geospatial data sharing within the Homeland Security Enterprise (HSE).

custom-web-application-development.summary: Developed and maintained complex Drupal 7 components for the GeoCONOPS platform, focusing on project delivery and technical communication.
points: Built complex Drupal 7 web applications, themes, and plugins.
Coordinated efforts using FogBugz issue tracking to streamline delivery within an expedited contract window.
Transitioned efforts towards a virtual environment, improving response times.
Translated complex technical challenges for non-developer stakeholders.
Supported open formats and data standards inherent in the GeoPlatform.

Engineered functionality to parse metadata from OpenOffice documents, enabling users to submit content in this format and expanding platform inclusivity.
Developed and maintained PHP-based web applications supporting Benetech's mission to provide technology for social good.
